heading: 2019 Releases
body:
- Includes several performance and stability improvements.

- Supports partition definition for the following:

  - `epoch_secs`, which is seconds since the Unix Epoch

  - `epoch_millis`, which is milliseconds since the Unix Epoch

  - `UUID`, which is binary subtype 4

* Includes several performance and stability improvements.

* Adds support for reading Apache ORC files.

- Supports filtering partitions by [Parquet file row group](https://parquet.apache.org/docs/) statistics.

- Supports [ObjectIds](manual/reference/method/ObjectId) in the
  path when specifying partition
  `databases.<database>.<collection>.[n].definition`.

* Returns an error if a query produces a document larger than 16 MiB.

* The [$indexStats](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/indexStats) stage now produces an empty list of indexes instead
  of an error.

* Supports [$out](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/out) to S3 storage format in JSON.

* [$match](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/match) now implicitly treats all terms as conjunctions.

* No longer parses empty files.

* Fixes an issue that caused the `{$match: {$expr: {$and: []}}}` expression
  to terminate the connection.

- Allows nested fields in partition [definitions](adf-path-syntax).

- No longer enumerates directories on S3 when a single subdirectory containing
  all the partitions matching the query is identified.

- Fixes an issue where the new storage configuration did not appear
  on the issuing connection after running [setStorageConfig](adf-setstorageconfig).

* Adds support for the [getLastError](manual/reference/command/getLastError) database command.

* Fixes a bug with how union types are handled in Avro.

* Supports [$out](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/out) aggregation pipeline stage to S3.

* [listIndexes](manual/reference/command/listIndexes) now always returns an empty list.

* Translates dot-delimited CSV and TSV keys into subdocuments.

* Storage configuration error message now includes a link to the
  documentation.

* Supports the XLSX file format.

* Includes the correlation ID in query execution error messages.

* Returns an error to the client when the cursor storage limit is reached.

* Returns an error to the client on the last [getMore](manual/reference/command/getMore) if the cursor
  storage limit is exceeded.

- Supports [listCommands](manual/reference/command/listCommands). For example: `db.runCommand({"listCommands": 1})`

- Includes partition size information in the output of [explain()](manual/reference/method/db.collection.explain).

* Returns the first batch of cursor results more quickly.

* Improves performance of [$lookup](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/lookup) when combined with [$unwind](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/unwind).

* Automatically supports `SCRAM-SHA-1` credentials without requiring drivers
  to specify this authentication mechanism.

* Provides a descriptive error message when the file format is unknown.

* Provides additional validation on [setStorageConfig](adf-setstorageconfig).

Initial public preview release of [federated database instances](atlas-data-federation).
